jobs.name: aos:gtd-capture:nightly-drain
jobs.prompt: Run the gtd-capture drain skill over every registered KB inbox your grants cover, oldest entries first. Use verb-first next actions. Deadline items become reminders first, tasks second, delivered to whatsapp:+<ID> when due. Honor sacred time: never schedule or fire a reminder during choir practice Thursdays 19:00–21:00 Europe/Lisbon; move it to the window end. Never delete inbox lines; append #triaged only. If all inboxes are clean, output exactly DRAIN: inbox clean. and deliver nothing.
